checksRun.name: npm run bugbash:smoke
checksRun.summary: .next/dev/lock exists and http://127.0.0.1:3330/login is not reachable; preflight refused to start another dev server and printed BUGBASH_BASE_URL reuse instructions.

checksRun.name: BUGBASH_BASE_URL reuse mode
checksRun.summary: Playwright ran against the existing service without starting webServer; failures are B26 runtime/business residuals, including duplicateOf BUG-002 parent suggestions 500 and teacher duplicate-key console errors.

browserOrPlaywrightEvidence.preflightBehavior: With .next/dev/lock and no BUGBASH_BASE_URL, npm run bugbash:smoke exits before Playwright with a clear reuse-service message.
browserOrPlaywrightEvidence.reuseBehavior: With BUGBASH_BASE_URL set, Playwright webServer is disabled and the suite runs against the existing service.
